text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Computation + dashboard flow: the System computes, roles view. Two-stage scoring: stage 1 normalizes each metric to 0-100 against configurable bands; stage 2 weights them into a composite per supplier per period (default delivery 40 / quality 30 / cost 20 / service 10). Compliance (cert

validity, doc completeness) is a hard GATE, not weighted. Grades A>=90 / B>=70 / C<70; AVL gate = certs 100% + composite >= threshold; Preferred = sustained Grade A. Two-factor OTIF (operational streak) and four-factor perfect order RL.1.2 (re-qualification gate) are computed and labelled
distinctly. Abnormal price spike > 5% above baseline. Forecasting is manual (month/quarter x qty, variance flag).
